title: Doc Export into PDF with all emoji's & Icons
excerpt: Currently the export of a pdf from a doc does not export with all icons or emojis included. Some icons come up and others do not. It is not consistent. PDF’s should come out looking exactly like the monday doc.

posts.author: Allea (Allea G)
posts.cookedHtml: Currently the export of a pdf from a doc does not export with all icons or emojis included. Some icons come up and others do not. It is not consistent. PDF’s should come out looking exactly like the monday doc.
